message.content:
@startuml
package Facelift {
    class InterfaceBase {
        label "C"
        text "Base C++ class for all generated interfaces"
    }

    class QMLAdapterBase {
        label "C"
        text "Base C++ class for all generated QML frontends"
    }

    class IPCServiceAdapterBase {
        label "C"
        text "Base C++ for class for all generated IPC adapters"
    }

    class InterfaceQMLAdapter {
        label "C"
        text "Implements the interface exposed to the QML engine, to be used by the UI code\nTurns data from the interface implementation into QML-compatible types\n... generated from IDL"
    }

    class Interface {
        label "A"
        text "C++ abstract class defining the interface\n... generated from IDL"
    }

    class InterfaceImplementationBase {
        label "A"
        text "Abstract helper class which contains boilerplate code to help writing concrete interface implementations\n... generated from IDL"
    }

    class InterfaceDummy {
        label "C"
        text "generated from IDL"
    }

    class InterfaceImplementation {
        label "C"
        text "concrete class implementing the interface"
    }

    class InterfaceIPCPProxy {
        label "C"
        text "generated from IDL"
    }
}

class Facelift {
    contains InterfaceBase, QMLAdapterBase, IPCServiceAdapterBase
}

Facelift --> InterfaceBase
Facelift --> QMLAdapterBase
Facelift --> IPCServiceAdapterBase

InterfaceBase --> InterfaceQMLAdapter
QMLAdapterBase --> InterfaceQMLAdapter
IPCServiceAdapterBase --> InterfaceQMLAdapter

InterfaceQMLAdapter --> Interface
Interface --> InterfaceImplementationBase

InterfaceImplementationBase --> InterfaceDummy
InterfaceImplementationBase --> InterfaceImplementation
InterfaceImplementationBase --> InterfaceIPCPProxy

InterfaceQMLAdapter --> Interface
InterfaceIPCPProxy --> Interface

InterfaceQMLAdapter --> Interface
InterfaceIPCPProxy --> Interface
